text_block_list.name: Popular UmaTuber
text_block_list.text: Anyway, in response to requests from our viewers! Today… can you believe it?! We've invited this very particular person to join us!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm Buena Vista! Thanks for having me on the stream today!

text_block_list.name: Popular UmaTuber
text_block_list.text: Our channel is all about covering the hottest topics and biggest names around… but today's stream has already broken our all-time concurrent viewer record!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow, there are so many comments…! "I've been waiting for Buena," "She's my new favorite," "I keep rewatching your races!" …Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Oh… "I'll be cheering for you at the Victoria Mile!" That makes me so happy…! Please do!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Everyone's support gives me strength. So let me hear you cheering as loud as you can, okay?

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh… Buena replied to my comment! I'm so happy, she's so cute!!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text: Buena's seriously crazy strong, right? She's totally winning the race! Let's go watch the Victoria Mile!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Buenaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Good luck!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes! Thank you so much!
On the day of the Victoria Mile… the cheers surrounding Buena Vista are even louder than they were during the Classic year.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: "Congratulations on keeping your streak as The 1st's most popular horsegirl!" "I voted for you like crazy!!"
choice_data_list: (She's basically an idol at this point…)
(She's basically an idol at this point…)

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: You've gotta win!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Right!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Thank you all so much for supporting me throughout the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'll run my heart out even in the Senior class… so that the Tiara will shine just as brightly!
(Waaaaaahhhh…!)
choice_data_list: Well… I think that's enough for—

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: "Trainer, you got this too!!" "Keep taking good care of Buena!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: "That's right, our Trainer too!" "We're cheering for both of you today!" "You should show up in the media more often too!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You were really popular too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I kind of was, actually. After all, you're wonderful, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If you appear in the media… of course you'll become popular, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Anyway! I've gotten plenty of energy from everyone… Now it's time to switch into race mode!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna give it my all. After all… Desire is here.
choice_data_list: Yeah. It'll be your first race against her since the Shuka Sho.
Yeah. It'll be your first race against her since the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The two of us now can put on an even better race than we did back then… And this time we'll be able to answer everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The view waiting beyond all those expectations… that's the breathtaking view we'll create together.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Buena. It's been quite some time since we last met here.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That makes me happy, Desire.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You were such an incredible rival… that the Shuka Sho showed me a beautiful view.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: And because of that… I knew there had to be an even greater one waiting beyond it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If I race with you again… we can create an even more wonderful breathtaking view, one that brings joy to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …You turned the expectations of everyone around you into strength. That's how you've made it this far.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: You seek a breathtaking view together with everyone, while I seek a world that belongs only to me. I've often thought… we're like reflections in a mirror.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: And yet, our destinies remain unchanged. The one I must overcome… has always been you.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: My longing for that world remains within my heart. And the path before me has always been singular.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Today… I shall prove the Saint's conviction before my world!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Thank you. For always keeping your eyes on me. And because it's you…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: We can create the breathtaking view that everyone's been waiting for!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Bring all your feelings, Desire! I'll take them all in!
